quiz.title: Grade-10 Physics: Midterm Review Quiz 3
quiz.subtitle: Comprehensive Review — Kinematics through Simple Machines
quiz.subject: Physics

questions.question: A test vehicle moving at an initial speed of $14.0\text{ m/s}$ undergoes a constant acceleration of $3.20\text{ m/s}^2$ over a time interval of $4.50\text{ s}$. Calculate the final velocity achieved by the vehicle at the end of this acceleration period.
A precision manufacturing blueprint specifies a critical clearance gap of $0.0640\text{ km}$ along a pipeline network. Convert this distance dimension directly into centimeters ($\text{cm}$).

A planet moves in a perfectly circular orbit around a massive star due to a continuous gravitational pull pointing directly toward the center of the star. Analyze the nature of the work performed by this gravitational force on the planet during one complete orbit.
questions.explanation: The gravitational force is always perpendicular to the planet's tangential displacement. $W = Fd\cos90° = 0$. Zero work is done.

questions.question: A high-performance drone with a total operational mass of $3.80\text{ kg}$ flies horizontally through a calibration course at a uniform speed of $16.5\text{ m/s}$. Determine the kinetic energy possessed by the drone during this flight segment.

A $65.0\text{ kg}$ sprinter starting from rest exerts a powerful forward drive force over a distance of $8.20\text{ m}$, reaching a linear velocity of $7.40\text{ m/s}$. Use the relationship between work and energy to calculate the average net force generated by the sprinter during this startup phase.

A static test block experiencing a sudden impact is subjected to an average net force of $840\text{ N}$ over a brief time duration of $0.0650\text{ s}$. Calculate the total change in momentum experienced by the block.

A conveyor belt system at a shipping depot performs $4.14 \times 10^5\text{ J}$ of useful mechanical work to transfer sorting bins across a warehouse facility in exactly $3.00$ minutes. Calculate the average power output sustained by the conveyor drive system.

A prototype diesel generator setup delivers a useful mechanical work output of $1.85 \times 10^6\text{ J}$ while operating at an energy efficiency of $38.0\%$. Determine the total thermal energy input that must be supplied to the generator.

A $1,500\text{ kg}$ sedan traveling east at $18.0\text{ m/s}$ collides head-on with a $2,800\text{ kg}$ delivery van moving west at $11.5\text{ m/s}$. The two vehicles stick together upon impact. Calculate the magnitude and direction of their common velocity after the collision.

A technician uses a first-class lever bar to pry open a jammed security hatch. The technician applies an effort force of $175\text{ N}$ at $1.40\text{ m}$ from the pivot, balancing a load located $0.200\text{ m}$ on the opposite side. Assuming a frictionless system, calculate the magnitude of the load force being balanced.

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You're well-prepared across all units!
scoreMessages.70: Good work! Review the topics where you made errors.
scoreMessages.50: Keep studying! Focus on work-energy theorem, impulse-momentum, and circular motion work.
scoreMessages.0: Significant review needed. Revisit kinematics, energy, momentum, and simple machines.
